reviews.review_description: Iv had the game for over a year now and it has only gotten 2 updates. The devs pretty much abandoned the game and so has the community. Sucks cause this could've been a good game if the devs didn't abandon it.1 star because of this.

reviews.review_title: Game is dead | no more updates
reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed this game at first. But no one plays anymore. Save your money and find another game. If the creators care and are reading this, just update the game! Maybe make it so you don’t lose everything or you can’t upgrade your stuff so much. It’s a lot of time lost when we just want to have fun. I’d rather worry about my pvp skill rather than my stuff.

reviews.review_title: Not good hate to say it
reviews.review_description:
Attention devs:

I want an option to change grabbing ammo from your belt and to reload to be used with the grab button. Not the triggers. It’s weird the way it is.
I can see this being better with more people online but was kinda boring on single player.

Been giving this game alot of hate lately 😒 not because I hate it because I love it..this is a 5 star game but the content is excruciatingly lacking....over a year and still no new map..the guns the mechanics the environments the monsters the missions, hunting with a bow for more cash, crafting recourses..learning this game in general is a blast some of the best hours ive spent in vr were right here. But then that's it...there's no point in keeping on after that...especially if you can't play a different map...even having us work for it would have been fun. Say once you fill all 4 gas tanks you have enough fuel to travel to the next challenging planet and the noobs are still on volcano learning the basics decide what fuel you want in your weapons and what fuel your using for travel and you rinse and repeat gather resources fill up on fuel go to a more dangerous planet..that right there would have saved this game..you could have even offered some sort of prize to who could sweep the last planet 1st. Have us on some ready player type shii .People would have been stuck in this game...instead it's just been neglected in an unfinished state..it deserved way more love than it got..but I still think the devs could turn this around

All of you giving one star reviews because there is not another planet…YOU CAN CLEARLY SEE THEY ARE GOING TO ADD TWO MORE PLANETS!!! It takes time. Stop complaining. Yes it should have been released with ATLEAST two planets, but stop hating. You all loooove the game. Shut up and play again.

Great game, a few flaws. First when you do a mission involving the signal disrupters,sometimes you can't shoot it. You fire at it and nothing happens. Also I wish there were private rooms. You get in with some people and they do the missions before you can get there. My game has frozen several times. More maps and realizations like being able to see taking off and landing from the inside. Awesome game, can't wait for updates

Update: the maps never came like promised. AI is still basic and spawns in exact same spot every run. I'm thinking it was such a mistake to change the game to pvp extraction. Might have been more of a success if they stuck to co op concept and just focused on making more planets and Missions. As a pvp, these games die too soon and since servers are empty, reviews go sour and everybody walks away with the game unfinished .  Looks like the wind is already out of the sails on this one, unfortunately and Wenkly already had a new title out. 

 Not finished but you will get your 19 bucks worth of fun as it is. If Devs add private PVE lobbies, I will 5 star this. Havent seen Wenkly give up on a game yet so I trust they will get this game polished in time
Gun plays decent lootings good, hell even AI is balancedish. My only complaints are that enemies eat bullets and ammo is too few

reviews.review_title: It had one map with no updates
reviews.review_description: This game is an example of why VR is not increasing its user base. This has had one map since release with weapons updates, this has been out a while now so this would be why no one wants to risk buying a game. This is another example of what is considered quality control with developers,  these half baked games are what is stalling growth in VR.

I am enjoying this game more and more as I keep playing. Some bugs here and there but nothing game breaking. There is a lot to the ugrading and weapon customization. As of 7/6/25 I have played 5 raids and unlike some of the other reviews, I found other players 4 out of 5 of the raids. I HOPE that Wenkly Studios hasn't give up on this game however because there is a lot of potential here and I would love to see the other maps. Its been 4 months since the last check in but I think there is still hope this game is not dead.
Its wherethit

It's a good game but in desperate need of an updates.  Needs new maps, playing one map 100 times gets pretty boring. The player base is small and needs more progress to get it going again. don't give up Devs keep up the good work.

developer_response.body: Hi! Thank you for playing Astro Hunters VR and for an honest review. We appreciate your feedback.

reviews.review_description: We need an update I’ve been trying to get my friend to get it but I can’t make it seem good if u don’t update!

Not a user friendly game. Locks up.  And you sink into landscaping.  If you drop a weapon it goes into ground and you loose it.  Also I plaid for  about 2 hours and got frustrated.  I asked for refund and they refused. Don't buy

developer_response.body:
We're sorry to hear that you had a negative experience with our game. If you encountered any issues, please feel free to report them to us at support@wenklystudio.com, and we will investigate the problem.
We do not handle refunds ourselves - those are managed directly by the store.

reviews.review_description: Hi this is my favorite game of all time!!! I play everyday, trying to level up. It’s so much to do and the graphics are amazing. I love the fact it’s multiplayer as well. Add me at (Cutgoodgaming) on YouTube, so u you see actual footage of the game, it amazes me every time!!!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing our game! We're glad you enjoy it.
Great gameplay video! <3

reviews.review_description: Does this game ever reset? Is there a way to reset your save it so that you can at least start over with some supplies and guns. Once you get down to a pistol you are cooked.

reviews.review_title: Really fun, definitely purchase on sale.

reviews.review_description: I thought the game would be fun the results were bad terrain no players and that just made me not want to play it any more

developer_response.body: We're sorry to hear that the game didn't meet your expectations. However, the game has a lot to offer, and we encourage you to give it another chance. You can also join our Discord community, where you'll find other players to connect and play with: https://discord.gg/yTMDg7xgeC

reviews.review_description: Bought this . Said I would give it a try . Everything said in the other comments was true. I'm the only person . No one else ever. This game has the making of something great. But no updates . No nothing . Nada.

At first everything seems overwhelming, you can do alot of crafting and purchase all kinds of things from suit customization to unlocking more storage space. Don't worry about all that at first, just try to knock out the missions. Really looking forward to the updates,  any wait to see the other planets, im hoping maybe Wenkly Studios can throw us like two different derelict ships with great loot. There's attachments for all types of weapons, theres  mods for your suit, mods for weapons, and grenades the hurt, heal, and provide cover, there's consumables that heal, speed up health regeneration, even improve your stealth. When you die you do lose your stuff, but you get to store a lot of stuff and weapons, so you can store all kinds of different and same load outs.
Such a great game honestly one of my favourite vr games I highly recommend!
What happened to this game,  I spent money on this game to have the devs just leave it unfinished and as far as I know abandoned! I want my $ back or finish the game!!!

The game is not good. PvE is not challenging at all whatsoever. PvP is nonsensical and pointless. There are guns in the game that can one shot players from great distances, that combined with how poorly the rendering for the landscape is makes the game a joke. Which is honestly sad because there's so much potential. Also you can craft everything in the game besides guns which makes the pvp even more pointless with nothing lost or gained.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback and review! As for the PvE mode, it was added in response to player feedback. many players wanted to experience the game without competition or simply practice before jumping into PvP.
Also, please note that you can upgrade your weapons, add augments, modifications and attachments. If you'd like to add anything else, feel free to contact us at support@wenklystudio.com. We appreciate every suggestion.

reviews.review_description: This game is very good, the progression, crafting system and resource collecting, as well as fighting native wild beasts or armed enemies. I didn't like the part where you die and lose all your gear just because you had to leave the play area for a few seconds, this is very unforfiving when you were carrying stuff you took a long time to upgrade.

Okay so here it is I'm just gonna say it. You guys have shot yourselves in the foot releasing this too early. You should have waited and released it with already the 3 maps/stuff in your roadmap and attachment updates/glitches and bugs sorted out etc not release it with just one map and glitches and bugs galore and then slowly go from there. And when i say slowly I mean slowly like come on guys it's been 4 months. So now what you've done is lose basically your whole player base and put other players off from even demoing this game and its gonna be so much harder now to win then back. Because you actually do have something here, its a sci fi extraction shooter  that also scratches the itch for players who have been longing for a no mans sky baby on standalone. It's really nicely done. The Volcanoe map is beautiful especially with QGO optimisation. The guns and mechanics (thankfully now fixed) are all great and fun. The upgrade system and inventory/crafting etc are also really well done and in depth. Enemies are well designed and also since ive been playing for the last 2 days seem like you may have fixed their A.I and made them legitimate threats too. If only you had released this fully done and ready to go maybe their would be actual people to shoot at too and not just NPCs. So now like I said since it's been 4 months already since launch you have one shot at getting people to play this game and unlock its true potential: and its pretty simple....just hurry the hell up and get it at release ready level and then market the hell out of it before it's too late. I really hope it takes off because it could be the number one extraction shooter no doubt in my mind. Just please do it before it's too late, otherwise it's gonna fail or take years to win the audience back just like, ironically, No Mans Sky when it first released too. Jesus christ when will you devs learn. 

Good luck and God speed, I'll be playing in the mean time and praying in the meantime too.

UPDATE: okay so as of today 28th of January I played for two hours and in that two hours had three crashes where the screen just froze and nothing unfroze it except powering down my quest 3. Each time it crashed I was full looted up with 3 epic guns and so much resources and obviously I lost it all. 3 SEPERATE TIMES. Even tried a different server location and happened on that one too. Now I know why this game is dead and has a 3.8 rating. Do not buy this game until the games is actually playable. God only knows when that will be.

a 2D trailer is the on barding experience. The menus are disjointed some you can use sticks and choose options, while others must be intersections with fingers, which is a terrible input by the way causing many miss clicks etc. The inventory placement is unintuitive, I've lost equipment and can't see the outline for reference while adjusting the belt in the awful menu UI. No instruction i was just in a hub area no introduction to gameplay. the developer can earn more stars by continuing to update and implement quality of life improvements and expand the environment(s). Good luck No updates in months for a live game like this is unacceptable

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review and feedback on the UI. We appreciate your thoughts and understand your concerns.
There are tutorials at the beginning of the game that guide you step by step through the basics. Additionally, whenever you interact with something for the first time, a tutorial pop-up explains how it works. Since this is an extraction shooter, losing your loot during a mission is part of the challenge—this is also mentioned in the game’s description. We hope you’ll give the game another chance. Thanks again.

reviews.review_description:
Enjoying the gameplay, couple of the guns feel a bit janky but that can be overlooked.

I'd really like to be able to remap jump from being up on the stick to a button, that's my biggest beef if I could do that I'd give the last star

I was running to the escape pod with something massive chasing me when another player was also running away from several massive things, we agreed not to kill each other by shouting frantically and both got in the same pod and extracted together! One of the best feelings I've had in VR!

Dealing with a disability, not being able to move my fingers, I would appreciate it big time, if you would update your controls. I need to toggle grab, to be able to play the game.
Will change my rating 🙂

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for bringing this to our attention. We’ll make sure to pass your feedback to the team.

reviews.review_title: Leaves a lot to be desired
reviews.review_description: When I got astrohunters I knew there was not a lot of content but I expected updates to follow however we barely got anything month's later and the game is dead with me wandering around the empty map trying to find hope that someone is out there I can go on and on the so much longer about the games issues but if I had to give a opinion on whether you should buy it LISTEN If you want to do multiplayer on this game but have no one to play with you will struggle to find people to play with so hold on and wait for it to grow if your a patient solo player you can get it and you can have a good time not for long however as updates are rare as I mentioned

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing our game and for sharing your honest feedback. Since the release of Astro Hunters, we’ve made several updates to improve gameplay and fix bugs, based on player feedback. We've also introduced new features like airdrops, hover, weapon attachments, and scopes. Currently, we are working on a new map.
We encourage you to join our Discord, where you can connect with others and organize games together: https://discord.gg/yTMDg7xgeC

reviews.review_title: Astro Hunt VR: A Stellar Space Adventure
reviews.review_description:
Astro Hunt VR is hands down one of the most immersive and expansive space exploration games I’ve ever played in VR. It perfectly captures the sense of adventure, wonder, and discovery, much like No Man’s Sky, but with the added depth of VR making every moment feel more personal and engaging.

The ability to seamlessly explore planets, gather resources, pilot spacecraft, and interact with alien environments is simply breathtaking. The visuals are stunning, and the attention to detail in alien landscapes is incredible. Flying through space and landing on a planet never gets old—it’s like stepping into your own sci-fi adventure.

The controls are intuitive, and the gameplay mechanics feel smooth. I especially love how the game encourages creativity and exploration at your own pace. Whether mining resources, building on new worlds, or just soaking in the beauty of the universe, there’s always something rewarding to do.

Performance has been solid overall, and updates have continued to refine the experience. The developers have clearly put a lot of passion into this project, and it shows in every detail.

Astro Hunt VR is a must-play for anyone who loves space exploration and VR. It’s more than just a game—it’s an experience. Highly recommended!

This game is very fun it is kinda like lethal company ￼but you can mine ore, collect guns, there are two different modes one is pvp and one is no pvp, you can kill weird creatures, and complete missions too with friends.

reviews.review_title: Best game of me and my Brother!
reviews.review_description: Nice weapons + the new scopes that we can find now, cool map( cant wait for new maps) , and the gameplay its very Nice the way You can team up or not , killing players to survive , hunting creature or mobs and having two mods pvp or pve its a very food thinking for developers. Overall a very good game specialy If You have with who to play with IT!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the kind words and feedback! We're thrilled to hear that you and your brother are enjoying the game.

reviews.review_description: Needs sorting out worked great now it keeps pinching my stuff keep going to put stuff on shelves gone weapons all sorts what a joke to run about for hours just to have it disappear

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing our game and for your review. 
Weapons should not disappear if you leave them on the gun rack. If they disappeared in the upgrade station, try entering the game again, and the weapon should be where you left it. 
If it's something completely different, we apologize in advance for the issue and encourage you to contact us at support@wenklystudio.com so we can ask you for details and help fix it.

reviews.review_description:
It's a good game with the possibility to be a great game. The Devs have been hard at work improving the game. Hope to see new maps, missions, weapons, and more enemies soon. Add this game to your library. 
Update: It was fun for a little while.  A game with one map gets boring pretty quickly.  I would suggest waiting for more maps and missions before buying.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We're actively working on a new map and more updates.

reviews.review_description: I was waiting for the update where our guns don't disappear, to buy it and they fixed it. This game is really fun.
Feeds my craving for Sci Fi adventure. Weapons are awesome and the gameplay is fun. First game I think of playing when I grab my headset.

Don't buy this game..the idiot develops can't fix out the glitches or bugs.. lack.bix appears and freezes you out the game and you loose all.your stuff you had collected.   Pitty the developers won't even release the new world. Avoid buying any games from them also.. very very poor company.. some other developers.of this game would be better...

developer_response.body:
We’re sorry to hear about your experience. We’re continuously working on improving the game and addressing issues, so we truly appreciate your feedback. If you encounter glitches or bugs, please don’t hesitate to report them on our Discord: https://discord.gg/yTMDg7xgeC or contact us at: support@wenklystudio.com
Also, we're working on a new map.  We recently showcased a trailer for it on UploadVR. You can check it out on our Discord as well.

reviews.review_title: There is PvE and added private servers
reviews.review_description:
This game has potential for people who don't like PvP since they have a PvE only mode but when you create your server random people still enter your server. It makes it look like you are getting your own server and can give out code for for friends to join you but your server still gets put in public queue for randoms to enter. These randoms go out and do the missions and collect the proofs before you even get close to the area for the mission.  Very annoying.  If you don't want to play with random people and little kids I would avoid.  

EDIT:  Update just add Private servers so only people you give code to can enter server.
I have played this game couple of times, but I only see bots and that’s it. There’s now any online players.

developer_response.body: We encourage you to join our Discord server (https://discord.gg/yTMDg7xgeC), where you can meet other players and arrange games together. It’s also worth checking out different regions in the game to find more online players.

reviews.review_description: My favorite game.
Gave it an honest 30 minutes, poor instructions, you learn as you go and unfortunately it just won't hold you attention.  The graphics remind me of games from the 99's 🙁.

developer_response.body:
We appreciate your feedback. There is an introductory video and tutorials at the beginning, but if you feel like you need more help or have questions, we encourage you to join our Discord: https://discord.gg/yTMDg7xgeC. Also, here’s a link to our FAQ: https://www.wenklystudio.com/faq-astro-hunters-vr.
We hope you won’t give up and will give the game another chance!

reviews.review_description: The drop ships that return you to your ship will often glitch out and drop you back on the planet surface, forcing you to quit the game and lose everything you have collected in that particular endeavor. Also, the magazines are very hard to get into the guns this game is almost unplayable, I don’t understand how it got out of beta in it’s current state ￼

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback.
We've fixed the issues with the pods, reworked the weapons, and added new features such as hover and weapon attachments. We apologize for the issues you encountered. We encourage you to give our game a try (if you've refound it, you can check out our new Free Trial). We look forward to hearing your thoughts

reviews.review_description:
I played the beta and it was full of problems .they release the game as a complete game and all the problems are still there .

The gunplay is terrible and the reloading animations hardly works unless you are stood still .the inventory is again dated and terrible .

The playerbase is non existent due to the problems .

Do not buy this game it's still in beta state and you will be paying to be a tester .you have been warned

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback. We understand your frustration with the issues you encountered We released a few updates recently, fixing major bugs, also reworking weapons. We encourage you to give the game another chance.

Our goal is to keep improving the game, and we’re actively listening to player feedback to make it the best it can be.

reviews.review_description:
Its almost 2025 and we still get games with Quest 2 graphics also there is no tutorial at all.
Game doesnt run smooth on quest 3
Inventurysystem is bad, you got a tablet and have to click trough menus to get an medkit for example. You only got 2 sideslots on your body for weapon or consumables. 
I had bad frameratedrops sometimes how is that even a thing on Quest 3? 
Cant recommend right now

reviews.review_title: Escape pods fixed! Game is FUN!
reviews.review_description: The only issue I had with the game was escape pods glitching out and losing all items. They have fixed most of the bugs and ever since the 2nd update I haven’t lost any items from a bug since. The game is extremely fun, give it a go.
To many problems to begin to list. Save your money and frustrations.

developer_response.body:
We're sorry to hear that you encountered bugs. We're actively working on fixing issues. If you'd like to elaborate on the bugs you experienced, please feel free to join our Discord: https://discord.gg/yTMDg7xgeC
We've got many in plans, so we hope that after fixing these bugs, you will come back to our game.

Update: We've fixed the launch issues and added new features. We encourage you to give the game another try. If you've refunded it, you can check out our Free Trial. Looking forward to your thoughts.

reviews.review_title: The devs care about this game.
reviews.review_description: Thanks for the roadmap update. Really l👀king forward to see what all you bring to this game. This game has such great potential. Listen to your community, and bring what you think is best for the game to make it even better. Thanks for wanting to stay on top of the bugs. This is not the same ole VR game where you fight zombies. This is a great space game where you fight other players, and aliens, or just aliens if you choose. This could easily be one of the best games for the quest if done right. If someone is thinking about this game just get it, and experience it for yourself. Thats the only way you can determine if you like it, or not. I enjoyed the times I have played it so far, and expect to enjoy it even more after the issues are addressed. The roadmap is going to continue to grow so thats another reason to get this game. This game is not that much for the experience you get. People pay more for unfinished flat console games that aren’t any good, and the trailers are pure cutscenes.
This is a very good game that has a lot of potential to be one of the greatest games on the platform as long as the developers put effort and care into its development.

OK this game is so much fun,  like a fun version of tabor , lil bit of a learning curve but don't take long . 8/10 from me only reason 8 and not 9 is only one map ... but it is huge lol .. and the map does not have a time limit you can die and suit up and go back and look for the dude who killed you .. loads of fun 😁 😂  and for the price yes have it

Good start to a game, excited to see it grow.

Points to improve so far
-Certain shotguns do not allow for a reload just the prompt 
-Tethering weapons to waist can be unreliable and weapons drop to ground 
-Weapons get stuck in tether slot when trying to draw 
-Reloading with pistol is clunky even with the various settings to adjust, controls always end up touching 
-When gripping weapon with support hand the weapon becomes angled towards the support hand, add weapon calibration so that we may adjust the offset
-Audible distance for footsteps can be deceiving, balancing 
-AI rework, super effective shooters, relentless pursuit makes it difficult for new players to get away from that fight

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We’re constantly working to improve the quality of gameplay and appreciate your suggestions regarding weapons and enemy AI. We will check all the issues you mentioned. Stay tuned for updates as we continue to refine the experience!

reviews.review_description: This is the best game I ever played. It’s basically the no man’s sky and halo at the same time. It’s just so addicting definitely the best vr game I’ve played.👍￼

I pre-ordered the game and was looking forward to it. Unfortunately the slow and janky framerate, the constant glitches (falling into the floor. Left behind by extraction pods, invisible PvP) and the numerous other glitches at launch have me contemplating a refund. Won't be touching this game again till they fix the broken launch.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your honest feedback. We truly apologize for the frustrating experience you've had with the game's performance and glitches at launch. 

We've fixed issues with extraction pods, invisible PvP, and many other bugs you may have encountered at launch. Now you can check out the Free Trial, so we encourage you to give it a try and see what's been fixed. We're looking forward to your feedback.

reviews.review_description: The game is good, yes there are bugs but that is to be expected for a game that just came out. If you like tabor you are gonna like this game, you can’t get one shot though. I just hope that for the future they fix the dupe glitch and all of the bugs with the missions and escape pods, and add more monsters and maps. Overall a GREAT game. It’s only duos and solo by the way.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing our game and for your review—it means a lot to us!
We're currently working on fixing several issues, including the bug with extraction pods, the inability to finish missions, the duplication glitch, and more. The update should be available soon.

reviews.review_title: Fun game with some party problems
reviews.review_description:
Great fun game. Just have some problems that need to be fixed. Playing with close friends seems to be a problem as we are unable to find each other in the game, even though we enter the same mother ship number. The second bug we found is that when we do happen to find each other, when we enter the same ship to play the same game, we land on different places and could not find each other in that area, or we leave the planet together but do not enter the same ship when we arrive on the mother ship. Last but not least on arrival of some planets, my player dies immediately even before the capsules door opens because of some monster attack. 
We always play as a party of 4 people in all our games so not being able to find each other and play the game together is kinda frustrating.
All and all when you finally get the drift of the game, it is fun and exciting.
Can't wait to finally be able to play the game together.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback. We're glad that you're enjoying the game!
When you join a Mothership with your friends, make sure that you are in the same region. 
You can join the same Mothership with your friends, but only two players can use the same capsule and they land on the same planet. If you and your friends use separate capsules, you will end up on different planets. This is designed to make the game fair for players on the planets and to avoid situations where 4+ squads are against 1 since this is a PvP game. 
When you leave the planet with the friend you traveled to the planet with, you should come back to the same Mothership. However, we see that this isn't working well, and we will improve it. 
We apologize for the bug where your friend was killed inside the capsule, and we will also investigate it. 
If you would like to leave more feedback, report a bug, or share some suggestions with us and other players, we encourage you to join our Discord: https://discord.gg/yTMDg7xgeC.

reviews.review_description: Best game

reviews.review_title: This Game Is So Much Fun!
reviews.review_description: This game has a lot of potential to it and it is very fun to play. Some things that the devs should patch are the glitching with the extract timer and putting mags into the guns. But overall a really good game so far!
